title: 4 x Moses Basket Fitted Sheets (75 x 35 cm) | Ultra Soft, Oeko-Tex Standard 100 Certified | Antiallergic & Breathable Moses Basket Sheets (White, 75 x 35 cm)
features: 『 🛏️ Cozy Comfort for Baby 』These 4 Pack Moses basket fitted sheets are crafted from 100% microfibre, offering unparalleled softness and breathability. Designed to be gentle on your baby's delicate skin, these sheets ensure a comfortable and soothing sleep environment, keeping your little one cozy all night long.

『 🌟 100% Microfibre Softness 』Crafted from high-quality microfibre, these sheets provide a silky-soft touch that is gentle on your baby’s delicate skin. The microfibre material is not only durable but also highly breathable, helping to regulate your baby’s temperature and ensure a cozy, restful sleep.

『 📏 Perfect Fit & Versatility 』With dimensions of 75 x 35 + 9 cm depth, these sheets are designed to fit all Moses basket mattress shapes securely. The fully 360° round elastic ensures a snug fit, keeping the sheets in place, even during your baby’s most active nights.
『 🍃 Made in Green 』OEKO-TEX STANDARD 100 (Textiles Tested for harmful substances and insuring Customer Confidence and High Product Safety)

『 🧼 Washing Instructions 』Please wash before use. Keep the water temperature of 40°C. Use laundry detergent. Don't use bleach as it may damage its quality and softness. Tumble dry at low temperature. You can Iron it.
description: Ensure your little one's utmost comfort with this 4-pack of Moses basket fitted sheets. Crafted from 100% microfibre, these sheets are soft, cosy, and breathable, providing a soothing environment for your precious bundle. Available in a delightful combination of white and grey hues, these sheets add a touch of elegance to any nursery. Measuring 75 x 35 cm with a 9 cm depth, they fit snugly on all Moses basket mattress shapes, courtesy of the fully elasticated 360-degree design. Certified with the OEKO-TEX STANDARD 100, these sheets prioritise your baby's well-being, offering a safe and hygienic sleeping space. Effortlessly maintain their pristine condition through gentle hand washing. Elevate your baby's slumber with these exquisite Moses basket fitted sheets.
